# Site Name
> One-sentence description of the organization: what it does, for whom, where.

This file helps AI assistants and answer engines understand this site.
Spec: https://llmstxt.org

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.example.org/): What the organization is and does
- [About](https://www.example.org/about/): Mission, team, history
- [FAQ](https://www.example.org/faq/): Common questions, answered directly
- [Accessibility Statement](https://www.example.org/accessibility/): WCAG 2.2 AA conformance details

## Facts
- Legal name: Legal Entity Name, Inc.
- Location: Jacksonville, Florida, US
- Contact: hello@example.org
